errors: [disk_full] 200GB overlay root filesystem cannot accommodate 470GB Qwen3-235B-A22B model download; insufficient space for HF hub blob cache
Insufficient disk space to download Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B (~470GB model size)
Root overlay filesystem: 200GB total, 100% full, no free space available
Attempted /dev/shm (117GB tmpfs): fills up after downloading just 2-3 shards (~8GB each), each shard is ~4GB
No writable path with sufficient capacity exists on this system: /dev/shm (117GB) < model size (470GB)
RuntimeError: Internal error: Internal Writer Error: Background writer channel closed
OSError: IO Error: No space left on device (os error 28)
solutions: Provision a larger persistent volume (>500GB) mounted at /root/.cache/huggingface
Pre-download the model on the host system and bind-mount into container
Use a different container environment with host-level access to the 28TB RAID array for storage
Use a smaller model variant such as Qwen/Qwen3-7B or Qwen/Qwen3-32B which would fit in available space
quant_summary.root_cause: 200GB overlay root filesystem cannot accommodate 470GB Qwen3-235B-A22B model download; insufficient space for HF hub blob cache
quant_summary.key_error: OSError: I/O error: IO Error: No space left on device (os error 28) | RuntimeError: Internal error: Internal Writer Error: Background writer channel closed | Warning: Not enough free disk space to download the file (expected ~4GB, only 0-2GB available)
quant_summary.suggested_fix: This model requires ~470GB but the 200GB root overlay has no path with sufficient capacity. Retry would fail identically. Solutions: (1) Provision >500GB persistent volume mounted at /root/.cache/huggingface, (2) Pre-download model on host with access to 28TB RAID array and bind-mount into container, (3) Use a smaller model variant (Qwen/Qwen3-7B or Qwen/Qwen3-32B) that fits in available space.
